name: yaos
description: A zero-terminal, real-time sync engine powered by your own Cloudflare Worker.

scripts.test:regressions: npm run guard:no-src-js-artifacts && npm run guard:concurrency-drift && npm run guard:qa-isolation && node tests/run-regressions.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:regressions && npm run test:integration:worker
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.guard:witness-readonly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src=fs.readFileSync('src/lab/diagnostics/deviceWitnessTracker.ts','utf8');const forbidden=['vault.modify','vault.create','vault.delete','vault.rename','applyDiffToYText','forceReplaceYText','Y.Text.insert','Y.Text.delete','Y.Text.format'];let found=false;for(const f of forbidden){if(src.includes(f)){console.error('FAIL: forbidden call found: '+f);found=true;}}if(!found){console.log('PASS: no forbidden calls in deviceWitnessTracker.ts');}process.exit(found?1:0);"
scripts.guard:checkpoint-path: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const tracker=fs.readFileSync('src/lab/diagnostics/deviceWitnessTracker.ts','utf8');const telemetry=fs.readFileSync('src/telemetry/installTelemetryRuntime.ts','utf8');const vaultRelative=['vault.adapter.write','vault.create','vault.modify'];let found=false;for(const f of vaultRelative){if(tracker.includes(f)){console.error('FAIL: vault write call in checkpoint path (tracker): '+f);found=true;}}const exportFnIdx=telemetry.lastIndexOf('async function _persistCheckpointSegmentsIfSafe');const exportFnBody=exportFnIdx>=0?telemetry.slice(exportFnIdx,exportFnIdx+1500):'';if(exportFnBody.includes('vault.adapter.write')||exportFnBody.includes('vault.adapter.mkdir')){console.error('FAIL: bundle export writes via vault adapter');found=true;}if(!found){console.log('PASS: checkpoint and bundle export paths do not write to vault');}process.exit(found?1:0);"
scripts.guard:no-vault-doc-diagnostics: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['src/lab/diagnostics/deviceWitnessTracker.ts','src/lab/diagnostics/witnessStateHash.ts'];let found=false;for(const f of files){try{const src=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(src.includes('getMap(\"yaos-diagnostics\")')||src.includes(\"getMap('yaos-diagnostics')\")){console.error('FAIL: diagnostics map found in '+f);found=true;}}catch{}}if(!found){console.log('PASS: no vault doc diagnostics map found');}process.exit(found?1:0);"
scripts.guard:qa-mobile-commands: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const telemetry=fs.readFileSync('src/telemetry/installTelemetryRuntime.ts','utf8');let found=false;if(telemetry.includes('prompt(')){console.error('FAIL: prompt() found in telemetry runtime');found=true;}const ids=['telemetry-export-witness-bundle','telemetry-show-device-identity','telemetry-refresh-witness-current-file','telemetry-trace-start','telemetry-trace-stop'];for(const id of ids){if(!telemetry.includes(id)){console.error('FAIL: command not registered: '+id);found=true;}}if(!found){console.log('PASS: telemetry commands registered, no prompt()');}process.exit(found?1:0);"
scripts.verify:bundles: npm run build && npm run guard:production-bundles:transitional
